description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum can with a vibrant purple and pink gradient exterior, designed to contain a juice beverage. The front of the can features bold, dark blue text with the word 'oculus' and a stylized 'O' logo, along with the word 'berry' indicating the flavor. The can has a typical pull-tab opening mechanism on top, made of silver metal. On one side, there is a detailed nutrition facts panel, a recycling symbol, and a QR code, all printed in white. The can's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for display in urban environments such as vending machines, convenience stores, or public parks.
description: A glossy purple aluminum can labeled 'oculus berry' with a pull-tab top, nutrition facts, and modern branding. The can features a smooth, reflective surface and bold, dark blue text.
description_view_0: The can is shown with the partial word 'OCU' in dark blue on a purple background, with the pull-tab top visible.
description_view_1: This view displays the full 'oculus' branding, the stylized 'O' logo, and the word 'berry' prominently on the front.
description_view_2: The can is rotated to show the side, revealing a small '3 ML' marking and partial view of the nutrition panel and recycling symbol.
description_view_3: The back of the can is visible, showing the complete nutrition facts panel, recycling symbol, and QR code in white.
